query:
UPDATE debt_collected_cache dc
JOIN (
  SELECT contract_external_id, MAX(period) AS max_period
  FROM debt_target_cache
  GROUP BY contract_external_id
) AS max_dt ON dc.contract_external_id = max_dt.contract_external_id
JOIN debt_target_cache dt2 
  ON dt2.contract_external_id = max_dt.contract_external_id 
  AND dt2.period = max_dt.max_period
SET dc.debt_range = dt2.debt_range
WHERE dc.debt_range IS NULL
  AND dc.period > max_dt.max_period;

JOIN debt_target_cache dt2 
  ON dt2.contract_external_id = max_dt.contract_external_id 
  AND dt2.period = max_dt.max_period
SET dc.debt_range = dt2.debt_range
WHERE dc.debt_range IS NULL
  AND dc.period > max_dt.max_period;
